name: Apollo 11
achievement: First humans to walk on the Moon
description: First human landing on the Moon. Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin walked on the surface while Michael Collins orbited above.

name: Apollo 12
description: Second human landing, touched down precisely near the Surveyor 3 probe. Demonstrated pinpoint landing capability.

name: Apollo 14
description: Third human landing. Alan Shepard notably hit golf balls on the lunar surface. Explored the Fra Mauro highlands.

name: Apollo 15
achievement: First use of the Lunar Roving Vehicle
description: First use of the Lunar Roving Vehicle (LRV). Explored the Hadley–Apennine region with extensive geological survey.

name: Apollo 16
description: Landed in the lunar highlands. John Young and Charles Duke extensively explored the surface and collected 95.8 kg of samples.

name: Apollo 17
achievement: Longest crewed lunar mission & most samples returned
description: Final Apollo mission. Included geologist Harrison Schmitt, prioritizing scientific study. Returned 110.5 kg of lunar material.

name: Surveyor 1
achievement: First US soft landing on the Moon
description: First lunar soft-landing by the United States spacecraft robotic program. Transmitted over 11,000 photographs.

name: Luna 9
achievement: First soft landing on any celestial body
description: First spacecraft to achieve a survivable landing on a celestial body and return photographs from the surface.

name: Luna 13
achievement: First mechanical soil analysis on the Moon
description: Conducted soil mechanical property tests using a penetrometer and radiation densitometer.

name: Luna 16
achievement: First robotic sample return from the Moon
description: First robotic probe to land on the Moon and return a sample of lunar soil to Earth. Retrieved 101 grams.

name: Luna 17
description: Carried Lunokhod 1, the first successful robotic lunar rover. Traveled 10.54 km across the lunar surface.

name: Luna 20
achievement: First sample return from lunar highlands
description: Successfully returned 55 grams of core sample from the Apollonius highlands region.

name: Luna 21
achievement: Deployed Lunokhod 2 — farthest-traveling rover of its era
description: Delivered the Lunokhod 2 rover, which operated for 4 months and traveled 42 km.

name: Luna 24
achievement: First detection of water traces in lunar soil
description: The final Luna mission. Detected the first evidence of water in lunar soil. Returned 170 grams of samples.

name: Chang'e 3
description: China's first lunar rover, Yutu, landed in Mare Imbrium. First soft landing on the Moon since 1976.

name: Chang'e 4
achievement: First-ever landing on the far side of the Moon
description: Historic first soft landing on the far side of the Moon in the Von Kármán crater. Deployed Yutu-2 rover.

name: Chang'e 5
description: First lunar sample-return mission since 1976, collected 1.731 kg of material from Mons Rümker region.

name: Chandrayaan-3
achievement: First landing near the lunar south pole (Shiv Shakti Point)
description: India's successful rover landing near the lunar south pole, at a site named Shiv Shakti Point. Deployed Pragyan rover for in-situ scientific analysis.

name: SLIM
description: Demonstrated precise pinpoint lunar landing technology. Landed inverted but still operated successfully.
